title: No sounds
description: Removes the sounds of explosions, ender pearls, and anchors
body:
Removes the sounds of:
- explosions
- ender pearls
- anchors

Perfect for crystal pvp and [my resource pack for pvp](https://modrinth.com/project/ehZrmfH1)  
If you find any bugs/problems, please send them to me at the spectr42 discord.  
It can work on versions below 1.20, I just haven't tested it.
